concerns.text: Acceptance Scenario 2 states 'Then of records have crossing number...'. Missing [deferred] marker for empirical value (e.g., '100%' or '[deferred]'). This breaks the sanctioned placeholder convention for planning docs.
Independent Test states 'on an exploratory validation sample (e.g., of knots)'. Missing [deferred] marker for sample size percentage/count.
FR-003 states 'If KnotInfo reference coverage is of the dataset...'. Missing [deferred] marker for coverage percentage threshold.
SC-006 states 'of knots with computable invariants have all invariants populated'. Missing [deferred] marker for coverage percentage.
SC-012 states 'where reference coverage of dataset'. Missing [deferred] marker for coverage percentage threshold.
